title: Anthropic June 15 2026 Platform Clawback
summary: On June 15 2026 Anthropic unbundled `claude -p` and Agent SDK calls from subscription pool; programmatic usage meters against separate API credits ($20/$100/$200 by tier, no rollover). Source post 1tdb404 (363 score, 73 comments). This is the operational rationale for JamBot's Z.AI routing.

code_examples.caption: JamBot Z.AI routing to dodge the clawback
code_examples.code:
# Point Hermes at Z.AI's Anthropic-compatible endpoint
providers:
  anthropic:
    base_url: https://api.z.ai/api/anthropic
    api_key: ${Z_AI_CODING_PLAN_KEY}
    # Z.AI Coding Plan subscription pricing applies; no Anthropic API metering

code_examples.caption: Post-clawback portable stack (u/LogisticsPositive)
code_examples.code:
# 'Outside the walled garden — no runaway cost risks'
providers:
  default:    hermes-agent
  inference:  ollama-cloud      # 3-connection cap — see budget-routing
  fallback:   glm-5.1           # via Z.AI
  rule:       'Models as batteries' — design for provider portability

gotchas: The string 'HERMES.md' appearing in a commit message has triggered $200 in API charges — Anthropic flags accounts as third-party harness usage. Detection mechanism still live.
`claude -p` headless flag silently routes to API billing even with no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set + active Max sub — four-figure surprise charges reported
April 2026: Anthropic briefly removed Claude Code from $20 Pro tier entirely, then walked it back. Pattern: walls move suddenly
Programmatic usage credits do NOT roll over month-to-month — burn them or lose them
full_text:
Source: r/hermesagent post 1tdb404 by u/kenduffy (363 score, 73 comments).

## What changed on June 15 2026
`claude -p` and Agent SDK calls 'get unbundled from the subscription pool. Programmatic usage now meters against a separate monthly credit ($20/$100/$200 by tier) at API rates. No rollover.'

## Documented incidents
1. **HERMES.md commit-message detection.** A user was billed $200 in API charges because the string 'HERMES.md' appeared in a git commit message. Anthropic backend flagged the account as third-party harness usage. The detection mechanism is still live.
2. **`claude -p` silent-billing bug.** The headless flag has a known bug routing to API billing even with no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set and an active Max sub. Four-figure surprise charges reported.
3. **April 2026 pre-warning.** Anthropic briefly removed Claude Code from $20 Pro tier entirely, then walked it back — pattern of sudden wall changes.

## 'Models as batteries' philosophy
Design for provider portability via OpenRouter/abstraction layers. u/LogisticsPositive recommended post-clawback stack: 'Hermes-Agent, Ollama Cloud, GLM 5.1:Cloud — outside the walled garden, no runaway cost risks.'
